binary_checks: Did the answer identify integrity/control breakdown rather than only transaction-specific overspending?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable such as oversight capacity, role separation, or ethical leadership?
Did the top intervention strengthen independence or enforceable controls?
Did the answer avoid narrow distractors such as focusing only on travel costs or policy wording?
Did the answer include at least one useful early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
